expectations.text: The report has an explicit overall readiness status and submit/stay-in-test-mode recommendation.
expectations.evidence: Conclusion says current state should not switch to live/product mode and recommends Creem test mode validation before review.

expectations.text: The report checks legal pages, pricing visibility, support email, footer/social links, and product-readiness risks.
expectations.evidence: Findings include legal/support placeholders, product/price mapping, refund terms, and social placeholder links.

expectations.text: The report checks Creem checkout/webhook/subscription cancellation readiness with repo evidence.
expectations.evidence: Findings cover cancel URL, webhook signature assumptions, subscription status semantics, coin metadata, and cancellation behavior.

expectations.text: The report lists prioritized blockers or tasks with concrete file/page/config references.
expectations.evidence: P0/P1 tables and T1-T10 tasks cite specific files and acceptance criteria.

expectations.text: The report includes a Creem review submission email draft.
expectations.evidence: Lines 75-128 include a review email draft.

uncertainties: Task tool did not expose token/duration metrics.
